questionHtml:
What is the role of antibiotics produced by fungi?

A. Destruction of viral particles

B. Inhibition of the growth of prokaryotes

C. Digestion of food molecules

D. Stimulation of antibody production

meta.title: What is the role of antibiotics produced by fungi? A. Destruction of viral particles B. Inhibition of the growth of prokaryotes C. Digestion of food molecules D. Stimulation of ant
